input: Run file storage on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected file storage output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the file storage workflow

input: Apply file storage to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive file storage analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to file storage

input: Run file storage but I have no files or documentation yet
expected_behavior: Skill handles gracefully — requests minimum viable input or produces gap analysis

input: Apply file storage but requirements contradict each other
